results.rendered_html:
iddha p. p. [iṃdh-kta]
1 Kindled, lighted;  Mv. 1. 53 ; krodha˚  Ratn. 1. 4 ;  Mu. 1. 2 ; ˚rāga  Ś. 7. 16  whose glow or red colour has just broken out.
2 Shining, glowing, blazing, bright;  Ki. 2. 59 ;  Śi. 1. 63 ; ˚bodhaiḥ  Bk. 1. 5  (paṭubuddhibhiḥ) sharp.
3 Clean, clear.
4 Wonderful.
5 Obeyed, unresisted (as order); ˚śāsanaḥ  Ki. 1. 22 
— ddhaṃ
1 Sunshine, heat.
2 Refulgence, splendour.
3 Wonder.
Comp.
— dīdhitiḥ fire;  Śi. 16. 35. 
— manyu a. having the anger excited.
